reviews.comment:
El ACA cubre en forma eficiente todas las necesidades de un automovilista. A los habituales servicios de venta de naftas, gasoil y lubricantes, se deben agregar rubros como taller, gomería, estacionamiento por hora y mes, turismo, seguros y turnos para obtener la licencia de conducir, VTV y DNI. Un combo completo y perfecto. Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA efficiently covers all the needs of a motorist. In addition to the usual services of selling gasoline, diesel, and lubricants, they also offer services such as a repair shop, tire shop, hourly and monthly parking, tourism assistance, insurance, and appointments for obtaining a driver's license, vehicle inspection (VTV), and national identity card (DNI). A complete and perfect package. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURLd0x6UUJ3EAE
